title: query result truncated
description:
distinct(cast(double as char)) may truncate result.
How to repeat:
create table t1 (double_col double);
insert into t1 values(-1.7976931348623157e308);
select * from t1;

+-------------------------+
| double_col              |
+-------------------------+
| -1.7976931348623157e308 |
+-------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

select distinct(cast(double_col as char)) from t1;
+----------------------------+
| (cast(double_col as char)) |
+----------------------------+
| -1.7976931348623157e30     |
+----------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)

result truncate when calling save_in_field
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, double_col DOUBLE NOT NULL, str_col VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (2, NULL, 'Another Value');
SELECT DISTINCT(CAST(double_col AS CHAR)) FROM t2 WHERE str_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT(CAST(double_col AS CHAR)) FROM t2 WHERE double_col IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: distinct cast on double truncates result
